problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: If Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
